description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof with dark red and gray shingles, accented by two prominent dormer windows on one side. The exterior walls are a mix of timber framing and stone, giving it a medieval or Tudor-inspired appearance. The windows are small, with red lattice panes, and are distributed asymmetrically around the structure. A tall, stone chimney rises along one side of the house, adding to its rustic charm. The entryway is recessed beneath a small overhang, flanked by stone columns and accessed via a stone path. The house sits on a slightly raised, irregular stone foundation, suggesting durability and age.
description: A medieval-style house with a steep gable roof, timber framing, stone chimney, and red lattice windows. The structure features dormer windows, a recessed entryway, and sits on a stone foundation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a small overhang, timber framing, and stone columns.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting two dormer windows, the stone chimney, and the tiled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the tall stone chimney and a small window beneath the gable.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two dormer windows and a clear view of the stone foundation.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed wooden door beneath a small overhang, flanked by stone columns and accessed by a stone path
